title: Lumi's 3D Items
description: Rotates every block to a more front-on perspective, and also rotates 2D item sprites slightly to match.
body:
![Redstone Blocks Creative Tab with the resource pack enabled.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wCUSpqwN/images/e0233626c4e8adee10af1be4c7d63ae819066524.png)

This pack changes every item model template that is used for the GUIs to a front-on perspective, and sligtly rotates 2D sprite template to match.

This was intended to make the items feel like they had more depth to them, and also focus more attention to the front face of the blocks in order to dicern the textures better on smaller GUI sizes.

Due to this changing the templates all items and blocks use, rather than each indivitual item or block, **this should work with mods, and even most other resource packs by default!**

![Building Blocks Creative Tab with the resource pack enabled.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wCUSpqwN/images/6eaec8be456dd85a0904a8eff689de702c29b14c.png)
